task_description: discover all CSV files, identify columns containing dates, compute date ranges, save a report, and print the widest date range found
code:
# Step 2: Identify columns containing dates in each CSV file
import os
import glob
import pandas as pd

csv_files = glob.glob('*.csv')

date_columns = {}
for file in csv_files:
    df = pd.read_csv(file)
    date_cols = [col for col in df.columns if pd.api.types.is_datetime64_any_dtype(df[col])]
    date_columns[file] = date_cols
print("Date columns identified:")
for file, cols in date_columns.items():
    print(f"{file}: {cols}")
